name: New England Oyster House Cole Slaw Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mayonnaise and sugar.
2. Stir in the white vinegar and prepared horseradish.
3. Add the celery seed and mix until well combined.
4. Chill the dressing for at least 30 minutes before using.
Makes about 2 1/2 cups. Use 1 cup of dressing for each 8 ounces of shredded cabbage, approximately 1/2 a small head or 2 cups. This dressing can be refrigerated for up to one month.
